===================
===================
Bob Dylan
Charleston
South Carolina
North Charleston Coliseum
2003.05.06

unkbnown rec. Great sound

CD1

1 intro 2 Everything Is Broken (Bob on piano), 3 I Don't Believe You (She Acts Like We Never Have Met) Bob on piano and harp), 4 Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum (Bob on piano), 5 Tell Me That It Isn't True (Bob on piano, Larry on pedal steel), 6 Things Have Changed (Bob on piano), 7 Just Like A Woman (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on pedal steel), 8 The Wicked Messenger (Bob on electric guitar and harp), 9 Love Sick (Bob on electric guitar),

CD2

1 Highway 61 Revisited (Bob on piano), 2 Saving Grace Bob on piano, Larry on pedal steel), 3 High Water (For Charley Patton) (Bob on piano), 4 Honest With Me (Bob on piano, Larry on slide guitar), 5 Moonlight (Bob on piano, Tony on standup bass), 6 band intros 7 Summer Days (Bob on piano, Tony on standup bass), 8 (encore), Like A Rolling Stone (Bob on piano), 9 All Along The Watchtower (Bob on piano)
